mapper.select: WITH ItemHierarchy AS ( SELECT ST1.FromItemID AS ParentItemID, ST1.ToItemID AS ItemID, ST1.SortNum, 1 AS Level FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 WHERE ST1.ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ST1.CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') AND ST1.Deleted != '1' UNION ALL SELECT IH.ItemID AS ParentItemID, ST1.ToItemID AS ItemID, ST1.SortNum, IH.Level + 1 AS Level FROM ItemHierarchy IH JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 ON ST1.FromItemID = IH.ItemID WHERE ST1.CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') AND ST1.Deleted != '1' ), RankedData AS ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER (PARTITION BY Item.Identifier ORDER BY Item.Identifier ASC) AS RNUM, Item.Identifier, Dic.Name AS ClassName, Dic.TypeCode AS ClassCode, Item.ItemID, [AT00001] AS Activity, [AT00003] AS Outline, [AT00015] AS Input, [AT00016] AS Output, [ZAT02015] AS PerformanceSystem FROM ( SELECT ItemID, AttrTypeCode, PlainText FROM [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM_ATTR] WHERE LanguageID = #{languageID} ) AS SourceTable PIVOT ( MAX(PlainText) FOR AttrTypeCode IN ( [AT00001], [AT00003], [ZAT02007], [ZAT02008], [ZAT02009], [ZAT02010], [ZAT02013], [AT00015], [AT00016], [ZAT02014], [ZAT02015]) ) AS ItemAttr JOIN [XBOLTADM].[TB_ITEM] AS Item ON ItemAttr.ItemID = Item.ItemID LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON Item.ClassCode = TIC.ItemClassCode LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY DIC ON Item.ClassCode = DIC.TypeCode AND Dic.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE Item.Identifier NOT LIKE '$%' ), FilteredData AS ( SELECT RNUM, Identifier, ClassName, ClassCode, ItemID, Activity, Outline, Input, Output, PerformanceSystem FROM RankedData WHERE RNUM = 1 ), ProcessCXN AS ( SELECT STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS r_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201A' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS r_ItemID, STRING_AGG( CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN CASE WHEN TATL2.Value IS NOT NULL AND TATL2.Value != '' THEN ITATR.PlainText + ' (' + TATL2.Value + ')' ELSE ITATR.PlainText END END, '$$ ' ) AS a_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201B' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS a_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS s_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201C' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS s_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS i_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201D' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS i_ItemID, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.PlainText END, '$$ ') AS c_text, STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN ITEM.ClassCode = 'CNL0201E' THEN ITATR.ItemID END, '$$ ') AS c_ItemID, ITEM.ToItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITEM LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR ON ITEM.FromItemID = ITATR.ItemID AND ITATR.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ITATR2 ON ITEM.ItemID = ITATR2.ItemID AND ITATR2.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT02028' AND ITEM.Deleted != '1' LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON ITATR2.AttrTypeCode = TATL2.AttrTypeCode AND ITATR2.PlainText = TATL2.LovCode AND ITATR2.LanguageID = TATL2.LanguageID WHERE ITEM.Deleted != '1' GROUP BY ITEM.ToItemID ) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY IH.Level ASC, IH.SortNum ASC, FD.ClassCode ASC, FD.Identifier ASC) AS NewRNUM, ISNULL(IH.ParentItemID, '') as ParentItemID, ISNULL(IH.ItemID, '') as ItemID, ISNULL(FD.Identifier, '') as Identifier, ISNULL(FD.ClassName, '') as ClassName, ISNULL(FD.ClassCode, '') as ClassCode, ISNULL(FD.Activity, '') as Activity, ISNULL(FD.Outline, '') as Outline, ISNULL(FD.Input, '') as Input, ISNULL(FD.Output, '') as Output, ISNULL(FD.PerformanceSystem, '') as PerformanceSystem, ISNULL(P_CXN.r_text, '') as r_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.r_ItemID, '') as r_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.a_text, '') as a_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.a_ItemID, '') as a_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.s_text, '') as s_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.s_ItemID, '') as s_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.i_text, '') as i_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.i_ItemID, '') as i_ItemID, ISNULL(P_CXN.c_text, '') as c_text, ISNULL(P_CXN.c_ItemID, '') as c_ItemID FROM ItemHierarchy IH LEFT JOIN FilteredData FD ON IH.ItemID = FD.ItemID LEFT JOIN ProcessCXN P_CXN ON IH.ItemID = P_CXN.ToItemID WHERE FD.ClassCode = 'CL01006' ORDER BY IH.Level ASC, IH.SortNum ASC, FD.Identifier ASC, FD.ClassCode ASC;

SELECT CASE C.TeamID When #{rootTeamID} Then 0 Else C.ParentID END AS PRE_TREE_ID, C.TeamID AS TREE_ID , D.Name AS TREE_NM , SortNum FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM C, XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT D WHERE C.TeamID = D.TeamID
AND C.Sourcesystemtype = 'SKON001'
AND C.Sourcesystemtype = 'SKON002'
AND C.Sourcesystemtype = 'SKON003'
AND C.Deleted != '1' AND D.LanguageID = #{sessionCurrLangType}
AND C.ParentID != 0
ORDER BY SortNum, TREE_NM ASC

SELECT * FROM( SELECT TOP ${topNum} Row_Number()OVER( Order by TI.LastUpdated DESC ) as RNUM , TI.ItemID , TI.Identifier , TIA.PlainText AS ItemName , TDIS.Name AS ItemStatusName , ISNULL(CONVERT(char(10), TI.LastUpdated, 120),'') as LastUpdated , TDT.Name AS TypeCode , TTT.Name AS TeamName FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA on TI.ItemID = TIA.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDIS on TI.Status = TDIS.TypeCode AND TDIS.Category = 'ITMSTS' AND TDIS.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TCLS on TI.ClassCode = TCLS.ItemClassCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_TYPE TIT ON TI.ItemTypeCode = TIT.ItemTypeCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TDT on TI.ItemTypeCode = TDT.TypeCode AND TDT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TI.AuthorID = TM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT ON TM.TeamID = TTT.TeamID AND TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TCS.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TCS.ChangeSetID = TI.CurChangeSet Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM TID ON TI.ItemID = TID.ItemID WHERE TI.Deleted != 1
AND TCLS.ChangeMgt = '1' AND TCS.ChangeSetID IS NOT NULL
AND TCLS.ChangeMgt = '0'
AND TI.CategoryCode = #{categoryCode}
AND TID.DimValueID = #{defDimValueID} AND TI.LastUpdated BETWEEN GETDATE()-7 AND GETDATE() )TC where TC.RNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 15 ORDER BY RNUM

SELECT Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY A.RNUM ASC) AS RENUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER(ORDER BY TI.CreationTime ASC) AS RNUM, 0 AS CHK, TI.ItemID, TI.Identifier AS Identifier, TI.ItemTypeCode AS ItemTypeCode, ISNULL(TIPT.Path, '') AS Path, AggData.Site AS Site, AggData.SiteCode AS SiteCode, ISNULL(TIA.PlainText, '') AS ItemName, ISNULL(TIA2.LovCode,'') as ZAT03010Code, ISNULL(TATL1.Value,'') as ZAT03010, ISNULL(TIA3.LovCode,'') as ZAT03011Code, ISNULL(TATL2.Value,'') as ZAT03011, ISNULL(TIA4.PlainText,'') as ZAT03030, ISNULL(TIA5.PlainText,'') as ZAT03040, ISNULL(TIA6.PlainText,'') as ZAT09006, ISNULL(TIA7.PlainText,'') as ZAT09005, ISNULL(TIA8.PlainText,'') as ZAT03050, ISNULL(TIA9.PlainText,'') as ZAT03070, AggData2.ZAT03090Code AS ZAT03090Code, AggData2.ZAT03090 AS ZAT03090, TI.ClassCode, TOT.Name AS OwnerTeamName, CONVERT(nvarchar(10), TI.CreationTime,120) As CreationTime, CASE WHEN #{languageID} In (#{languageID},2052,1041) THEN TM.Name ELSE ISNULL(TM.NameEN,TM.Name) END AS Name, TI.Version, TI.Status, TSD.Name AS StatusName, TCS.Status as CSStatus, TCD.Name AS CSStatusName, TID.Name AS ItemTypeName, ISNULL(ST.FromItemID, '') AS PItemID, TI.AuthorID, L2.PlainText as L2Name, L2.itemID as L2ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI INNER JOIN ( SELECT DIM.ItemID, STRING_AGG(DTXT.Name, ', ') AS Site, STRING_AGG(DTXT.DimValueID, ', ') AS SiteCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM DIM INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DIM_VALUE_TXT DTXT ON DTXT.DimValueID = DIM.DimValueID and DTXT.LanguageID = #{languageID} GROUP BY DIM.ItemID ) AggData ON AggData.ItemID = TI.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TIA.ItemID, STRING_AGG(TIA.LovCode, ', ') AS ZAT03090Code, STRING_AGG(TATL.Value, ', ') AS ZAT03090 FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL ON TIA.LovCode = TATL.LovCode WHERE TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03090' AND TIA.LanguageID = '1042' GROUP BY TIA.ItemID ) AggData2 ON AggData2.ItemID = TI.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TSD ON TI.Status = TSD.TypeCode AND TSD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TSD.Category = 'ITMSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS ON TI.CurChangeSet = TCS.ChangeSetID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TCD ON TCS.Status = TCD.TypeCode AND TCD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TCD.Category = 'CNGSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TID ON TI.ItemTypeCode = TID.TypeCode AND TID.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TT ON TI.CompanyID = TT.TeamID AND TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TOT ON TI.OwnerTeamID = TOT.TeamID AND TOT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TI.AuthorID = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TI.ItemID = TIA.ItemID AND TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA2 ON TI.ItemID = TIA2.ItemID AND TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03010' AND TIA2.LanguageID = '1042' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL1 ON TIA2.LovCode = TATL1.LovCode AND TATL1.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA3 ON TI.ItemID = TIA3.ItemID AND TIA3.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03011' AND TIA3.LanguageID = '1042' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_LOV TATL2 ON TIA3.LovCode = TATL2.LovCode AND TATL2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA4 ON TI.ItemID = TIA4.ItemID AND TIA4.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03030' AND TIA4.LanguageID =#{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA5 ON TI.ItemID = TIA5.ItemID AND TIA5.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03040' AND TIA5.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA6 ON TI.ItemID = TIA6.ItemID AND TIA6.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT09006' AND TIA6.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA7 ON TI.ItemID = TIA7.ItemID AND TIA7.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT09005' AND TIA7.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA8 ON TI.ItemID = TIA8.ItemID AND TIA8.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03050' AND TIA8.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA9 ON TI.ItemID = TIA9.ItemID AND TIA9.AttrTypeCode = 'ZAT03070' AND TIA9.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST ON TI.ItemID = ST.ToItemID AND ST.CategoryCode = 'ST1' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR L2 ON ST.FromItemID = L2.ItemID AND L2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND L2.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT ON TIPT.ItemID = TI.ItemID AND TIPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE (TI.Deleted != 1 or (TI.Deleted = 1 AND TI.Status = 'REL') ) AND TI.ClassCode in (${defClassList}) ) A WHERE 1=1
And L2ItemID = #{L2ItemID}
And ZAT03010Code = #{ZAT03010}
And ZAT03011Code = #{ZAT03011}
And ZAT03030 like N'%'+#{ZAT03030}+'%'
And ZAT03040 like N'%'+#{ZAT03040}+'%'
AND ItemID IN (Select ItemID from XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM Where DimTypeID = '100001' AND DimValueID in (#{ZAT01070}))
And ZAT09006 like N'%'+#{ZAT09006}+'%'
And ZAT09005 like N'%'+#{ZAT09005}+'%'
And ItemName like N'%'+#{AT00001}+'%'
And ZAT03050 like N'%'+#{ZAT03050}+'%'
And ZAT03070 like N'%'+#{ZAT03070}+'%'
And ZAT03090Code like N'%'+#{ZAT03090}+'%'
